headline: EPAM (EPAM): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: EPAM has gotten torched over the last six months - since November 2025, its stock price has dropped 48.9% to $91.47 per share. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: CRA, SAIC, OSI Systems, EPAM, and Kyndryl Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after a key inflation report showed producer prices surged more than anticipated in April.
